execution: Direct via Shopify Admin MCP (graphql_mutation pageUpdate). Batch 3 of the CMS pages improvement pass — 3 more pages chosen for high variance (branded competitor comparison, conversion-critical, legal/policy).
scope: Three mixed-type CMS pages: one branded competitor comparison (mirroring the mattress-firm-vs pattern from batch 2), one conversion-critical commerce page (Low Price Guarantee), one legal page that hadn't been touched since 2016 and was carrying stale policy that contradicted the canonical Love Your Bed Guarantee.

additions: 4-step 'How the price match works' ordered list
'How our price match compares' 6-row comparison table (LA Mattress vs big-box chain vs online-only)
'What counts as an authorized retailer' explainer + per-brand authorized retailer list (Tempur-Pedic, Stearns & Foster, Sealy, etc.)
Critical 'unauthorized resellers void warranty' warning (was missing — protects shoppers from buying through third-party Amazon sellers where the brand warranty is void)
'What's NOT eligible' 6-bullet exclusions list (internet-only specials, floor samples, liquidation, open-box, wholesale/employee/military, bundle pricing)
8 FAQ Q&As inline (plus the 8 added to lib/faq-extra.ts for FAQPage JSON-LD)
removed: Old image reference (Low_price_Guarantee_1024x1024.jpg from 2018 — broken responsive sizing on modern viewports)
Broken internal link to https://la-mattress.myshopify.com/#locations (legacy shop URL — sanitizer redirects but the anchor #locations doesn't exist on the current Locations page)
Single-paragraph blob (replaced with structured sections + tables + FAQ)

additions: 15-row side-by-side comparison table (core material, feel, best-for sleep position, pressure relief, motion isolation, cooling, edge support, bounciness, couples, hot sleepers, adjustable base compat, trial periods, warranty, made in, price range)
'How they feel — in your own words' section with quote-style descriptions for each brand
'Pressure relief: where they're really different' explainer (memory foam vs GelFlex grid mechanics)
'Cooling: where Purple has an edge' — calls out Tempur-Pedic's Breeze upcharge
'Pricing: where you can save' section with promo + bundle + Low Price Guarantee references

'When Tempur-Pedic is the right pick' / 'When Purple is the right pick' / 'When neither is the right pick' framing (intellectually honest — links to S&F, Chattam & Wells, Diamond, Helix as alternatives)
7 FAQ Q&As inline (plus 7 in lib/faq-extra.ts for FAQPage JSON-LD)
removed: Single-paragraph body claiming 'Tempur-Pedic stands out as the superior choice' (biased framing without comparison data — couldn't rank meaningfully for 'purple vs tempur-pedic' queries because it didn't actually compare them)
pages_body_updated.seo_context: Branded comparison query ('purple vs tempur-pedic', 'tempur-pedic vs purple', 'which is better tempur or purple') has high commercial intent and lower competition than the bare brand queries. The previous body was 638 chars of biased opinion; the new body is 13.9KB of structured comparison content with internal links to both /collections/tempur-pedic-mattresses and the memory foam category.

additions: 16 numbered sections covering: sales final-ness, final-sale items, 120-Night Love Your Bed Guarantee, manufacturer warranty, promotional items, delivery/pickup, pricing and price match, payment and financing, CA recycling fee, sales tax, order acceptance, shipping limitations, limitation of liability, governing law/venue, privacy, changes to terms
Full company legal name disclosure (LA Mattress Store, Inc. dba Los Angeles Mattress Stores)

Cross-references to all sibling policy pages (love-your-bed-guarantee, warranty, mattress-store-delivery, mattress-store-financing, lowest-price-guarantee, mattress-recycling-fee, privacy-policy, data-sharing-opt-out)
Explicit limitation of liability + governing law sections (CA, LA County jurisdiction)
6 FAQ Q&As inline (plus 6 in lib/faq-extra.ts for FAQPage JSON-LD)
removed: Stale 2016 content (8.5 years old, never updated to match current operations)

$50 transportation fee for comfort exchange (CONTRADICTED the canonical Love Your Bed Guarantee which states 'no restocking fee, no shipping fee, no re-delivery fee'). Reconciled to match current ops.
pages_body_updated.critical_fix: The 2016 terms-conditions page had a $50 transportation fee for the 120-night exchange. The just-updated (PR #208) /pages/love-your-bed-guarantee canonical policy says 'No restocking fee, no shipping fee, no re-delivery fee. White-glove pickup of the original mattress and delivery + setup of the replacement is included.' These directly contradicted each other — customers reading the legacy terms page would have seen a different policy than what's actually offered. Now consistent.

companion_code_changes.changes: Added CMS_PAGE_FAQS entries for lowest-price-guarantee (8 Q&As), purple-mattress-vs-tempur-pedic (7 Q&As), terms-conditions (6 Q&As). All ship FAQPage JSON-LD automatically via getCmsPageFaq() → genericPageLd().

verification: Subagent ran sequential pageUpdate + verification query on each page. All 3 confirmed: userErrors empty, updatedAt freshly advanced, body length within ±150 bytes of source (Shopify HTML formatter adds newlines inside table/list cells), no PLACEHOLDER / FULL_BODY_HERE strings. Spot-checked terms-conditions body inline — 16 sections render, all internal links present, no policy contradiction with /pages/love-your-bed-guarantee.
expected_seo_impact: FAQPage JSON-LD now ships on all 3 pages (21 new Q&As in JSON-LD)
Branded competitor query 'purple vs tempur-pedic' family — body went from 638 chars to 13.9KB of substantive comparison content with internal links to both product collections

Conversion-critical page 'lowest-price-guarantee' now has a clear 4-step process, eligibility table, exclusions list, and authorized-retailer guidance (was a single paragraph with broken image + broken internal link)
Legal liability — terms-conditions now matches the canonical Love Your Bed Guarantee policy (was contradicting it with a $50 transportation fee for the exchange)
Internal linking — terms-conditions cross-references all 8 sibling policy pages, building the legal-pages cluster
followup: After deploy: Rich Results Test on all 3 pages to confirm FAQPage schema emission
After deploy: /pages/terms-conditions visual QA — 16 numbered sections render in proper hierarchy
Optional next pass: brand-specific warranty pages (6 of them, all 2023 — low priority because brand-locked content)
Optional: audit /pages/queen-mattress-near-sylmar-la-mattress-store (has broken inline CSS .seo-container { ... } that won't render in this storefront — either fix or redirect)
